codeReview.summary: The fix restores direct coverage of the original `/onchain/simple/networks/eth/token_price/:address` endpoint while keeping the test deterministic by seeding the CeFi baseline in SQLite instead of relying on a 15-second live timing window. The updated assertions keep the intended CeFi/DeFi coherence check and also verify the simple-token-price response contract on the exact path that previously flaked.

summary: Pass: reviewed the prior failure, both diffs, the fix transcript skeleton, handoffs, and regression-gate skill guidance. Commit `8cc7c15` adequately addresses the original scrutiny failure by reinstating stable, meaningful coverage on `/onchain/simple/networks/eth/token_price/:address` without reintroducing the removed timeout-based flake.
